meaning: 普拉塔斯群岛(某些外国人沿用的殖民主义者对我国东沙群岛的称呼)
examples: The 1 997-98 ENSO event caused extensive coral bleaching in the atoll of Tungsha Island (Pratas Is. ).
City was constructed on the Ionian Sea in the Augusta Bay Pratas strip, there are two Bridges connected with the main island.
Pratas Hotels located in the beautiful scenery along the Pearl River Line Daishatou Road on the 22nd, is a three-star standard design on the decoration of guesthouses.
